title: 23:27 â November 1, 2023
body_text:
23:27 â November 1, 2023
Update to the Wires Part
We updated the Wires Part to reflect enhancements described in the news item:
Important updates on Wires processing and Payment Stream Direct (PSD) UI changes coming in November 2023
published on August 25, 2023.
We also updated the chapter for
MemberDirect
Â®
Business Services (MDB) and Forge Commercial Wires.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.5, Financial Institutions that Participate in Wires
We removed this section. Wires Participants can be in any province; therefore the statement canât be generalized. The subsequent sections were renumbered.
Section 1.5, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We added a link to Payments Canada high-value system (Lynx).
Section 1.6, Wires Document Library
We added the 2-Step Security for Business User Administration (BUA) â User Guide. This document relates to MDB or Forge Commercial Wires.
Section 8.8, Creating a Wires User in MTS
We added a note to the Transfer and Daily Limit fields that users responsible for approving wires created in MDB or Forge Commercial must have sufficient limits to approve wires for all business customers.
Section 9.5, Entering Branch Settings in MTS
We updated the procedures for completing the Level 1 Authorization field for transits used to process wires created in MDB or Forge Commercial vs. transits used to process in-branch wires. The value entered in the Level 1 Authorization is not used for in-branch wires.
Section 14.6, Deadlines for Outgoing Wires
We updated the description for financial institutions in Canada that donât participate in Wires.
Section 16.5, Completing the Wire Priority Section
We added a new section describing how to send a priority regular wire. Related images throughout the Part were updated. The subsequent sections were renumbered as a result.
Section 16.6, Completing the Future Dated Wire Section
We added a new section describing how to send a future-dated regular wire. The subsequent sections were renumbered as a result.
Section 17.5, Completing the Wire Priority Section
We added a new section describing how to send a priority bank to bank wire. Related images throughout the Part were updated. The subsequent sections were renumbered as a result.
Section 17.6, Completing the Future Dated Wire Section
We added a new section describing how to send a future-dated bank to bank wire. Related images throughout the Part were updated. The subsequent sections were renumbered as a result
Section 22.1, Overview of Approving Outgoing Wires
We added a description of the authorization requirements for MDB or Forge Commercial wires.
Chapter 23, Cancelling Outgoing Wires
We updated procedures for cancelling an outgoing wire, including cancelling an approved future-dated wire.
Section 24.7, Returning Incoming Wires
We added a new section describing how to complete the Return Reason Section. Financial institutions can return a wire with a return reason code or enter a narrative reason for return.
Chapter 25, Recalling, Tracing, and Amending Wires
We added procedures on requesting the cancellation of an approved future-dated wire via ServiceNow.
Chapter 29, Business Customers Using
MemberDirect
Â®
Business Services (MDB) or Forge Commercial to Create Outgoing Wires
We updated the entire chapter.
